customer_anxiety_profile: Raymond is low-resistance but low-engagement — he answered questions cooperatively but volunteered little. His one moment of active skepticism (cost claims at 03:47) was partially resolved by the bill-swap reframe but not locked with an emotional flip. He is not anxious in the traditional sense, but his deference to his wife on financial matters suggests the closer will be working with an incomplete decision-making unit.
unresolved_concerns: Cost skepticism partially resolved but not anchored — Raymond said 'I don't believe' free solar claims; the bill-swap reframe helped but no flip was deployed
Roof age is ambiguous — Raymond estimated 20 years total age with 10 years remaining; closer should confirm actual age and assess whether a roofing conversation is appropriate
Bill not yet received — appointment is conditional on Raymond retrieving and sending the ComEd bill; closer should confirm bill was received before the sit
